businessChallenge.zh: 多家企業 in-house App 需依場域動態調整表單欄位，逐案重寫表單邏輯的成本極高且難以維護。
businessChallenge.en: Multiple enterprise in-house apps needed dynamic form fields per domain. Per-client form rewrites were costly and unmaintainable.

technicalStrategy.zh: 設計 JSON 驅動的動態表單引擎，以 MVVM 架構分離表單定義與 UI 渲染。涵蓋保全、航空、健檢、電信等場域，讓新客戶只需配置 JSON 而非重寫程式碼。
technicalStrategy.en: Designed JSON-driven dynamic form engine with MVVM architecture separating form definitions from UI rendering. Covered security, aviation, health checkup, and telecom domains — new clients only need JSON config, not code rewrites.

zh: 客戶端 Xamarin 技術教育

text.zh: 某保全業 in-house App：MVVM 動態表單架構，帶領 7 人、6 個月交付
text.en: Security industry in-house app: MVVM dynamic forms, led 7 engineers, 6-month delivery

text.zh: 某航空業 in-house 工單 App：動態表單 + 至客戶端 Xamarin iOS 授課 5 天
text.en: Aviation in-house work-order app + 5-day Xamarin iOS client training

text.zh: 降低新客戶 onboarding 成本，表單配置取代程式碼重寫
text.en: Reduced new client onboarding cost — form configuration replaced code rewrites

lessonsLearned.zh: 可重用的架構模式（如動態表單引擎）是企業 in-house 開發的核心競爭力。一次設計、多次複用的投資報酬率遠高於逐案客製。
lessonsLearned.en: Reusable architecture patterns (like dynamic form engines) are core competitive advantage in enterprise in-house development. Design once, reuse many times — ROI far exceeds per-project customization.

problem.zh: 多家企業 in-house App 需依場域動態調整表單欄位，逐案重寫成本高。
problem.en: Multiple enterprise in-house apps needed dynamic forms without per-client rebuilds.

solution.zh: 以 MVVM 設計 JSON 驅動表單引擎；涵蓋保全、航空、健檢、電信等場域。
solution.en: MVVM JSON-driven form engine for security, aviation, health checkup, telecom in-house apps.

text.zh: 某保全業 in-house App：MVVM 動態表單架構，帶領 7 人、6 個月
text.en: Security industry in-house app: MVVM dynamic forms, led 7 engineers, 6 months
